name: DARK SOULS™: Prepare To Die™ Edition
description: Dark Souls will be the most deeply challenging game you play this year. Can you live through a million deaths and earn your legacy?
requirements:
• OS *: Windows XP , Windows Vista, Windows 7, or newer
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo E6850 GHz+ or AMD Phenom II X2 545 3.0 GHz+
  • Memory: 2 GB
  • Hard Disk Space: 4GB
  • Video Card: GeForce 9800 GTX+ or ATI Radeon HD 4870+
  • DirectX®: 9.0c
  • Sound: Direct Sound Compatible
  • Additional: Microsoft Xbox 360® Controller for Windows® (or equivalent) is strongly recommended.
comment1: There is not much to say, you either love it or hate it. For the ones who hate it, git gud.
comment2: One of the finest action RPG games ever made. The quality of this title is of the highest kind, quality, and order. Supreme. Play this game, and weep at the failings of modern design.
comment3: God-tier game. Carved the path for endless games after it. Truly a classic.
